description_long: This hotel features a grand, rectangular main building with a large central courtyard or pool area, flanked by rows of palm trees and manicured landscaping. The entrance is marked by a prominent, multi-level portico with steps leading up to the main doors, and the grounds are symmetrically organized with lush greenery and pathways. The structure is predominantly white or light-colored, with flat roofs and clean, modern lines, suggesting a contemporary or minimalist architectural style. The pool or water feature is centrally located and bordered by green hedges, enhancing the luxurious ambiance. The hotel appears to have multiple stories, with large window openings and possibly balconies or terraces facing the pool. The overall layout is expansive, with the main building and entrance area separated by landscaped gardens and walkways.
description: A modern, white hotel with a central pool, palm-lined landscaping, and a grand entrance portico. The structure is expansive, with clean lines and lush surroundings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, steps, and symmetrical landscaping with palm trees leading to the central pool.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated main building, flat roofs, and the extensive pool area bordered by greenery.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the pool, flanked by palm trees, and the back facade of the hotel with large windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the length of the building, landscaped grounds, and the separation between the entrance and main structure.
